examples: Paleontologist Peter Murray has studied a rock painting in far northern Australia that shows what looks very much like a megafauna marsupial known as Palorchestes.
In the 1920s, a paleontologist discovered the fossil remains of a small dinosaur near a nest containing eggs.
Horner, a paleontologist at Montana State University, suspects the remains of Nanotyrranus may belong to a young Tyrannosaurus rex.
"We can see evidence of what happened to her during life, " says paleontologist Bill Simpson.
Louise Leakey, the fabled Kenyan paleontologist built a precise 3D model of a fossilized skull.
